subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Bahá! Though some time hath elapsed since any word or sign of attraction hath reached these regions from that ardent leaf [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امه البهاء هر چند مدتیست که خبر و اثر انجذاب باین دیار از آنورقه پرالتهاب
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @education of children; moral education, @music and singing, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
